channel.title: Turn-Based Rpgs on Chasing Dings!
channel.description: Recent content in Turn-Based Rpgs on Chasing Dings!

item.title: Dark Quest 4: More Hero Quest than ever?
item.description: Can Dark Quest 4 satisfy your insatiable appetite for Hero Quest, except on a computer?

item.title: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 1/3
item.description: Clair Obscure: great gameplay, characters and milieu, but its third act seems in a hurry to get off the stage.

item.title: FANTASIAN Neo Dimension (Part 1)
item.description: A throwback to the classic JRPGs set in handcrafted dioramas, Fantasian Neo Dimension is a love letter to the Final Fantasy series.

item.title: The White Raven: A Cinematic Tactical RPG
item.description: After two years, GatherRound Games has released their first peek at their upcoming Fire Emblem-style tactical game.

item.title: Final Fantasy VI Pixel Remaster: Completed!
11/11/11: The Thousand Year Second
item.description: “11/11/11: The Thousand Year Second” is a turn-based strategy game about time, relationships, and choices.

item.title: The Nine-Lives Chronicles
item.description: You play as a young woman who discovers she has nine lives. Along with eight other people who also have nine lives, you must use your extra lives to help others and make the world a better place.
